titleStmt.title: SII 17.274: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 274. (A.R. No. 249 of 1904.) TIRUMALAI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Veṅkatēśa Perumāḷ temple.
The details of date given, viz., Śaka 1385, Subhāṉu, Tulā, śu. 7, Tuesday, Uttirādam correspond to 1463 A.D., October 18, Tuesday, f.d.t. ·05; ·87.

It records a similar undertaking by the sthānattār in Tirumalai given to Timmarājadēva-mahārāja, son of Guṇḍurāja, who made a gift of gold and land in Avalāli to provide for 4 dishes of food offerings during the śiṟukālai sandhi for god Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyāṉ for the merit of Narasiṅgarāja Uḍaiyar. It is also stipulated that a portion of the food offerings should go to those tending a garden, for the merit of Timmarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śvastiśrī . śakābdaM Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Eṇpattu Añciṉmel cellā niṉṟa subhāṉu saṃvaTsarattu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyuM
cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattunāḷ śrīmaN mahāmaṇṭaleśvara metiṉimicura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva cāḷuva kuṇṭurācaUṭaiyar kumārar timmarāca
tevamahāIrāca Uṭaiyaṟkku tirumalaiyil stāṉattārom śilāsāsaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi naraciṅkarāja Uṭaiyar tarmmam Āka tiruveṅkaṭa muṭaiyāṉ
nāḷvaḻi nālu tiruppoṉakam Amutuceytu Aruḷumpaṭikku tammiṭaiya kaiyil poṉ Iṭṭu cīrupāṭiyil Ellaiyile talaipparicu Iṭṭu kīḻkāl
variyum veṭṭuvittu tiruviṭaiĀṭṭam Avalāliyil Ellaiyile nīrparappi nilamum tirutti payiṟum Eṟṟi Inta mutalum śrī paṇṭārattukku ceṉṟuvarukaaiyil Inta mutalu
kku tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ nāḷvaḻi ciṟukālai cantiyuṭane kūṭa nālu tiruppanāoṉakam Amutu ceytu Aruḷumpaṭikku kaṇalayil malaikiniya niṉṟāṉ kālāl Amutupaṭi nālumā
kkālum ney Amutu Uriyum paṟṟu Amutu Uriyum miḷaku Amutu Uppu Amutu kaṟi Amutu tayir Amutu nāḷ vaṭṭam śrī paṇṭārattile viṭṭu Amutu ceytaruḷakkaṭa
varākavum Amutu ceytu Aruḷiṉa prasātattile nāḷ vaḻi Oru prasātam tirumalaimele timmarāca Uṭaiyār dharmmam Āka tiruṉantuvaṉam payir ceykiṟa tāsaṟku
nāḷvaḻi Iṭṭu niṉṟa mūṉṟu prasātamum pūrvvattil canti Aṭaippile stāṉattār cila vaḻittuk koḷḷakkaṭavarākavum Immariyātikku Inta nālu cantiyum
nāḷvaḻi tiruveṅkiṭa muṭaiyāṉ tammiṭa sanatāṉa paramparai sandraātityavarai Amutu ceytu Aruḷakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku śrīvaiyiṣṇavarkaḷ paṇiyāl koyi
l kaṇakku tiruniṉṟa Ūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śrīvaiyiṣṇavarakṣai .
Text published in Tirumalai Tirupati Dēvasthānam Epigraphical Series, Vol. II No. 17.
Digital edition of SII 17.274 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
